Ekakanipāta/Paṭhamavagga/Lobhasuttavaṇṇa.text: Saṁ 3. 65 piṭṭhe. 2. Ma 1. 15; Saṁ 1. 322 piṭṭhesu. 3. Ma 3. 22 piṭṭhe.

Itivuttakaṭṭhakathā/Dutiyavagga/Saṁghabh.text: Yogakkhematoti tato dhaṁseti parihāyati (Syā) yogakkhemāti hitato vidhaṁsati parihāyati (Ka)

Itivuttakaṭṭhakathā/Tatiyavagga/Mettābhā.text: Majjhimadivase eva (Sī, Syā, Ka) Aṁ-Ṭṭha 3. 194; Saṁ-Ṭṭha 1. 134 piṭṭhesupi passitabbaṁ.

Dukanipāta/Paṭhamavagga/Dukkhavihārasutt.text: Na pūriyāti (Ka) Ma-Ṭṭha 2. 45; Abhi-Ṭṭha 2. 455; Aṁ-Ṭṭha 1. 57 piṭṭhesupi passitabbaṁ.

Itivuttakaṭṭhakathā/Dutiyavagga/Sukkadha.text: Na hi lajjā na bhayaṁ nibbhayaṁ vā alajjanaṁ atthīti (Sī)

variants.reading: Na hi lajjā na bhayaṁ nibbhayaṁ vā alajjanaṁ atthīti

Itivuttakaṭṭhakathā/Dutiyavagga/Nibbānad.text: Sabhāvadhammesu (Ka) 2. Khu 1. 52 piṭṭhe. 3. Khu 1. 254; Aṁ 1. 343 piṭṭhesu.

Itivuttakaṭṭhakathā/Dutiyavagga/Paṭisall.text: Sabhāvadhammesu (Ka) 2. Khu 1. 52 piṭṭhe. 3. Khu 1. 254; Aṁ 1. 343 piṭṭhesu.

Itivuttakaṭṭhakathā/Dutiyavagga/Addhāsut.text: Pubbe anāgatā, pacchā atītā (Syā, Ka) Abhi-Ṭṭha 2. 8 piṭṭhepi passitabbaṁ.

Itivuttakaṭṭhakathā/Dutiyavagga/Dutiyarā.text: Na atarīti atiṇṇo (Sī), na atarīti na tiṇṇo (Syā)

Itivuttakaṭṭhakathā/Tatiyavagga/Micchādi.text: Ma 1. 102 piṭṭhe. 2. Aṁ 1. 35 piṭṭhe. 3. Micchā vācaṁ abhāsiyāti (Sī, Syā, Ka)

Itivuttakaṭṭhakathā/Pañcamavagga/Aggappa.text: Dutiyasutte (Sī, Syā, Ka) Aṁ 1. 22 piṭṭhe passitabbaṁ.

Itivuttakaṭṭhakathā/Pañcamavagga/Tevijja.text: Tasmā vijjā uppannā (Sī, Ka) Vi-Ṭṭha 1. 131; Ma-Ṭṭha 1. 130 piṭṭhesu passitabbaṁ.

Itivuttakaṭṭhakathā/X/Sīlasampannasuttav.text: Ettha (Sī, Syā, Ka) Dī-Ṭṭha 3. 204; Aṁ-Ṭṭha 2. 256 piṭṭhesu passitabbaṁ.

Itivuttakaṭṭhakathā/X/Taṇhuppādasuttavaṇ.text: Ettha (Sī, Syā, Ka) Dī-Ṭṭha 3. 204; Aṁ-Ṭṭha 2. 256 piṭṭhesu passitabbaṁ.
